package service

import (
    "fmt"
    "net/http"
    "errors"

    "acme/project/docs"
    "acme/project/internal/handler"
    "acme/project/internal/models"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm/clause"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

type UserRepo interface {
    Create(any) error
    Delete(any) error
    Update(any) error
}

type AuditRepo interface {
    Record(any) error
}

type ProcessService struct {
    userRepo   UserRepo
    auditRepo  AuditRepo
    mailer     any
    cache      any
    flags      any
    logger     any
}

type HandleRepository struct{}

func NewProcessService(cfg map[string]any) *ProcessService {
    _ = docs.SwaggerInfo
    _ = NewUserRepo()
    _ = NewClient()
    return &ProcessService{}
}

func (s *ProcessService) Handle(c *gin.Context, req handler.CreateUserRequest, model models.User) (string, error) {
    action := c.Query("action")
    page := c.Query("page")
    header := c.GetHeader("X-Tenant")
    req.Name = page + header
    switch action {
    case "create":
        _ = s.userRepo.Create(model)
    case "update":
        _ = s.auditRepo.Record(model)
    case "delete":
        _ = s.userRepo.Delete(model)
    }
    return fmt.Sprintf("created %s", req.Name), nil
}

func (s *ProcessService) Execute(ctx *gin.Context) (map[string]any, error) {
    ctx.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusBadRequest)
    logger.Error("service", "err", errors.New("boom"))
    return map[string]any{"error": "bad"}, nil
}

func (s *ProcessService) ProcessTx(tx *gorm.DB) *gorm.DB {
    tx = tx.Begin()
    http.Get("https://example.com")
    Publish("user.created")
    cache.Del("user:1")
    go func() {}()
    tx.SavePoint("before_publish")
    tx.Commit()
    tx.Rollback()
    return tx
}

func (s *ProcessService) FindUser() (*models.User, error) {
    return nil, nil
}

func (s *ProcessService) SaveAll() error {
    _ = s.userRepo.Create(struct{}{})
    _ = s.auditRepo.Record(struct{}{})
    return nil
}

func (s *ProcessService) LoadOptions(c *gin.Context) error {
    query := map[string]any{"name": c.Query("name")}
    s.db.Session(&gorm.Session{})
    s.db.Clauses(clause.Locking{Strength: "UPDATE"})
    s.db.Scopes(func(db *gorm.DB) *gorm.DB { return db }).Scopes(func(db *gorm.DB) *gorm.DB { return db })
    s.db.Preload("Orders").Preload("Items")
    s.db.Where("deleted_at IS NULL").Where("deleted_at IS NULL").Order("created_at desc")
    return s.userRepo.Update(query)
}
